candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over duplicate total row.
Duplicate total revenue row with identical values; useful as fallback across years.
Not revenue; operating expense.

variables.notes: Used revenue labels as a priority list, preferring the non-total row first.

candidates.why: Direct cost of sales/revenue line; preferred over duplicate total row.
Duplicate total row with identical values; less preferred than the direct line.

variables.notes: Selected the direct COGS line and excluded the duplicate total to avoid redundancy.

candidates.why: Core operating overhead component.
Administrative overhead component.
Dedicated R&D expense above operating profit; included in XSGA as well so XSGA-XRD removes it per PROF convention.
Subcomponent/rest row of Sales and Marketing; less preferred than parent component row.
Subcomponent/rest row of Administration; less preferred than parent component row.
Subcomponent/rest row of Research and development; less preferred than parent component row.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row is present. Selected the main overhead buckets above operating profit. Included 'Research and development' because it is separately reported and not obviously embedded in the selected overhead rows, so XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD yields SG&A excluding R&D.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above operating profit; best XRD mapping.
Subcomponent/rest row, less preferred than full R&D line.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization Expense in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Only a component of R&D, not the full R&D expense.

variables.notes: Selected the dedicated above-EBIT R&D expense line.

candidates.why: Primary recurring interest expense line.
Recurring financing cost; should be included with interest expense.
Recurring finance-cost bucket; included since granular components are preferred over total financial expenses.
Broader total that includes exchange losses; avoided because granular recurring components exist.

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance-cost rows and excluded 'Financial expenses' to avoid double counting and excluded exchange losses as non-interest/FX items.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests.
Close equity total, but less precise than parent-attributable equity.
Broader equity label and inferior to parent-attributable equity when available.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent

variables.notes: Preferred parent-attributable equity to exclude any non-controlling interests. Included 'Shareholders' Equity - Total' as fallback for years where labels may differ.
No minority interest/non-controlling interest row appears on the provided balance sheet.
